name: ref_begin
definition: Start of REF period. Absolute date (YYYY-MM-DD) OR negative integer for rolling-index mode (e.g. -5 means 5 windows before current)

name: ref_end
definition: End of REF period. Absolute date (YYYY-MM-DD) OR negative integer (e.g. -1 means exclude self). Must be > ref_begin when both are negative.

name: stack_method
definition: Stack method for REF computation (Mode A only)

name: pws_timegate
definition: If stack_method=pws: smoothing width in seconds (Mode A only)

name: pws_power
definition: If stack_method=pws: power of the weighting (Mode A only)

name: wienerfilt
definition: Apply Wiener filter to daily CCFs before REF stacking (Mode A only). Y/N

name: wiener_mlen
definition: Wiener smoothing along date axis (time delta, e.g. 24h)

name: wiener_nlen
definition: Wiener smoothing along lag-time axis (time delta, e.g. 0.5s)
